name: U3-SDK
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        SmartlyDressedGames /

      U3-SDK  

    
      Source code for Unturned, a free open-world zombie survival sandbox game.
summary: 这是免费开放世界僵尸生存沙盒游戏《Unturned》的源代码，值得关注因为它为游戏开发者提供了学习商业游戏完整架构的宝贵机会。

name: agent-skills
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        addyosmani /

      agent-skills  

    
      Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
summary: 该项目为AI编程助手提供生产级别的工程技能，帮助开发者构建更可靠、高效的AI辅助编程工具。

name: OfficeCLI
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        iOfficeAI /

      OfficeCLI  

    
      OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
summary: OfficeCLI是首个专为AI代理设计的免费开源Office工具，无需安装Office即可直接读写和自动化处理Word、Excel及PowerPoint文件。

name: wonderwhy-er
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        wonderwhy-er /

      DesktopCommanderMCP  

    
      This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities
summary: 该项目为Claude构建了MCP服务器，使其具备终端控制、文件系统搜索和差异文件编辑能力，值得关注的是它极大扩展了AI助手对本地系统的操作权限。

name: huxingyi
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        huxingyi /

      autoremesher  

    
      Automatic quad remeshing tool
summary: autoremesher 是一个用 C++ 开发的自动四边形网格重划分工具，它能够高效地将三角网格转换为更规整的四边形网格，值得关注是因为它在几何处理和计算机图形学领域提供了自动化的高质量网格重构解决方案。

name: claude-video
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        bradautomates /

      claude-video  

    
      Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.
summary: 该项目让Claude AI能够分析视频内容，通过下载视频、提取画面帧和转录音频，为视频理解提供了创新解决方案。

name: pocket-tts
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        kyutai-labs /

      pocket-tts  

    
      A TTS that fits in your CPU (and pocket)
summary: 这是一个能在CPU上高效运行的轻量级文本转语音模型，因其体积小巧且性能出色而值得关注。

name: asgeirtj
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        asgeirtj /

      system_prompts_leaks  

    
      Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
summary: 该项目收集并定期更新多个主流AI模型（如Claude、GPT、Gemini等）泄露的系统提示词，为研究AI行为机制提供重要参考。
